name: Arif Hossain
bio: Roommate from BUET days. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. Now he's a software engineer in Toronto.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: Senior product manager who guided me through my first job. We grab coffee every couple of weeks when she's in Dhaka.

name: James Okoro
bio: Met through an indie game dev Discord server. We collaborated on a jam project in 2023 and have stayed close since.

name: Priya Menon
bio: We backpacked through Nepal together after graduation. She now lives in Bangalore and we try to visit each other yearly.

name: Lucas Ferreira
bio: Brazilian dev I met at a React conference in Singapore. We do weekly code reviews of each other's side projects.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Grew up on the same street in Mirpur. She moved to Sydney after her wedding but we still send voice notes regularly — or used to.

name: Tom Nakamura
bio: UI designer at a startup in Tokyo. We collaborated remotely on a fintech app and became good friends over Figma and late Slack threads.

name: Fatima Al-Rashidi
bio: Our families have known each other for decades. She's studying medicine in Riyadh and we talk almost every other day.
